title: lygistum hirtellum
intro: Lygistum hirtellum, also known as creeping lilyturf or hardy lilyturf, is a type of low-growing, spreading perennial grass native to China and Japan. The plant's leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine, valued for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Lygistum hirtellum include its ability to soothe and calm the body, reducing stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried and used in capsules or powders for medicinal purposes.
